dialogos.texto_en: Wow...!
This is amazing.\nIt's just as the name suggests.
Yes, it's definitely Emerald Beach!
But really, the transparency is incredible...\nYou can see right into the sea.
I had no idea there was such a beautiful ocean.\nI could look at it forever.
But%p-2;――
Hm? Why did you take your shoes off?
Well, of course, just watching isn't enough.\nThat's so wasteful.
Ah, hey?!
It's a bit cold, but it still feels good!
Itsuki...\nYou'll get wet, won't you?\nAnd you don't have any spare clothes.
It's okay.\nI'm just putting my feet in a little bit.
How about you, Uesugi-kun? Do you want to join me?
I'm good.\nMy pants'll get wet.
What a waste!\nLet's not worry about the little things like that.
As for your pants,\neven if they get wet,\nthey'll dry in no time.
...Well, if you put it that way.\nJust wait a moment.
(I'll take off my shoes\n and roll up my cuffs...\n Alright, it looks like I won't get wet.)
Alright, maybe a little.
Thank you!
Why thank me?
Ahaha...\nActually, it's a little embarrassing\nbeing the only one to let loose like this.
Haha, is that so.\nCan't be helped. I'll frolic with you.
(I'll take off my shoes\n and roll up my cuffs...\n Right, now I'm ready.)
Okay, it would be a shame to not enjoy it.
Yes, while we've got the chance, right?!\nYou can't experience the feeling of the sand\nand the coldness of the sea anywhere else but here.
That's right.\nOkay then%p-2;――
(I'll take off my shoes\n and roll up my cuffs like this,\n so I won't get wet... Here we go!)
Whoa!\nIt's surprisingly cold!
But it feels good, doesn't it?
Yeah, I'm glad I went in after all%p-2;――
Take that!
Hey, what the hell?!\nDon't splash me, I'll get wet!
Don't worry about the little things!\nYah!
You...you've done it now!
Splashing water with your feet is kind of rude,\nbut since we're at the beach, I guess it's okay, right?
No, even if the sea forgives you,\nI won't!
Ah! That's COLD!
Heh, I landed a clean hit.
Now you're in trouble!\nRaah!
I won't fall for that trick again! Take this!
Eeeep!
Ha-ha-ha!\nIt's your fault for making me go all in!
It's too early for you to celebrate!
Whoa?!\nAlright, I'll fight back with everything I've got!
...Oh, great.\nWe're both completely soaked now.
Well, I only did it cause you challenged me, Uesugi-kun.
You're clearly the one who started it.\nI just fought back, didn't I?
What's wrong?
N-nothing, um...\nI just got a little too excited\nand didn't consider the other tourists around us.
(...Th-that's true!)
(We're almost done with high school,\n yet here we are splashing water at each other!\n The pressure of traveling can be tense...)
I guess no one's...really paying attention to us.
Well, now that I think about it,\neveryone else is on vacation too.\nThey're probably just focused on their own fun.
Yeah, we didn't really notice anyone else\naround us either.\nI guess everyone is in their own little world here.
In that case...maybe we were just being\na little too self-conscious.
...I'm starting to feel more embarrassed\nabout that than anything else.
Yeah...
A-alright!\nSince it looks like nobody is watching us,\nlet's continue our competition%p-2;――
I don't want to get any wetter than I already am!
